entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: A region characterized by semi-arid climates and fragile ecosystems.

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: A socio-economic problem affecting the semi-arid tropics.

entities.name: FOOD INSECURITY
entities.description: A condition where reliable access to sufficient affordable, nutritious food is lacking in the semi-arid tropics.

entities.name: POPULATION GROWTH
entities.description: The rapid increase in population contributing to problems in the semi-arid tropics.

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL DEGRADATION
entities.description: The deterioration of the environment in the semi-arid tropics.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL R&D STRATEGIES
entities.description: Research and development strategies designed to address agricultural challenges in the semi-arid tropics.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics.

entities.name: PATANCHERU, INDIA
entities.description: The location where the symposium was held and where ICRISAT is based.
